'''''Modd''''' was a [[Delta-class DX-9 stormtrooper transport|''Delta''-class DX-9 stormtrooper transport]] used by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

''Modd'' and ''[[Leven]]'' laid a minefield around the [[Mon Calamari Star Cruiser/Legends|Mon Calamari Star Cruiser]] [[Lulsla (MC40a light cruiser)|''Lulsla'']] during the first phase of the assault by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] during the [[Aftermath of Hoth]].

{{Ship-stub}}

*[[Star Wars: TIE Fighter (video game)|''Star Wars: TIE Fighter'']]
